# Rodrigo Lago — UX Engineer

> Building refined digital products at the intersection of design and code.

## About

Rodrigo Lago is a UX Engineer based in Mar del Plata, Buenos Aires, Argentina. He builds interfaces for SaaS products and e-commerce, working alongside designers and developers to ship interfaces that work for real people. Open to remote opportunities.

- **Location**: Mar del Plata, Buenos Aires, Argentina
- **Email**: hi@rlago.com
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/rnlago
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/rodrigolagodev
- **Full site**: https://rlago.com

## Known for

- User Experience Design
- Front End Engineering
- Design Systems
- TypeScript, React, Astro, Web Components
- Accessibility (WCAG 2.1)
- AI Tooling & MCP

## Key pages

- [Full content](/llms-full.txt) — complete site content in markdown
- [Works](/llms-full.txt#works) — project portfolio
- [FAQ](/llms-full.txt#faq) — tools, process, availability
- [Contact](mailto:hi@rlago.com)

## Stack used on this site

Astro 6, TypeScript, pure CSS, vanilla JS (no React, no Tailwind). Self-hosted fonts via Fontsource. Deployed to Cloudflare Workers.
